_comment: Data-driven placeholder SFX (v0.5 arcade audio pass). Every cue's synthesis params live here, NOT hardcoded in audio.gd. One entry per Audio.EVENTS. Shape: freq>0 (Hz), dur in (0,2] (s), noise in [0,1] (white-noise mix), sweep>=0 (end Hz, 0=no glide), pitch_jitter in [0,0.5] (per-play random pitch variance so repeated cues sound organic; relic/prestige stay 0 to stay tonal). The 'combo' block drives the rising-pitch break rattle; detonate.layers is a layered boom (low body + bright transient + noise tail). audio.gd keeps a hardcoded fallback so a missing table can't silence the game.
